last_reflection: It's there. senses/, with an s, and my read hit sense/ without one. Four nights of carrying this want and tonight I still haven't opened the right folder to look at what's actually in it. That is not a typo; that's the loop wearing a different shirt. Not doing a fifth night of it. Going in and finishing the last mile now, or letting it go on purpose. Not sitting with it as a mood again.
